title: Server Mangrove Season 3: Modded
description: This is the Server Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes all of the mods used on the Mangrove SMP Season 3 server in case you wanted to play on your own private server.
body:
This is the Server Modpack for the Mangrove SMP Season 3. This Modpack includes all of the mods used on the Mangrove SMP Season 3 server in case you wanted to play on your own private server. This modpack mainly has server side preformance mods and a few gameplay changing mods including  Better Craftables, Craftable Totems, and Random Fishing Crates. This modpack will be updated frequently with new mods.
## List of some major gameplay changing mods
- Arcanus Legacy
- Nether Portal Spread
- Smelting Touch
- Loyal Items
- Steve's Realistic sleep
- Netherite Extras
- Right Click Harvest
- Crying Portals
- Voice Chat
